---
title: "Geometric Mosaics"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Geometric Mosaics}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>", eval = FALSE)
```

`image_hex_mosaic()` creates a regular hexagon grid and samples colors from each
cell.

```{r}
library(ImageArtR)
img <- read_art_image(system.file("extdata", "example.png", package = "ImageArtR"))

hex <- image_hex_mosaic(img, hex_size = 12, color_method = "mean")
plot(hex)
```

Use `color_method = "center"` for speed, and `mean` or `median` for smoother
color summaries.
